turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi there! I'm calling to schedule an appointment, but I might need to switch the day. Could you help me find a good time?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para motivos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Of course, I can help with that. Could you let me know what kind of appointment you’re looking to schedule, and do you have any preferred days or times in mind?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Before we get started, would you like to create a demo patient profile?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, my name is Jordan Miller.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I just need your first and last name.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your patient profile is set up.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: And your date of birth is July 4, 2000 for demo purposes.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: How may I help you today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I’m trying to book an appointment, maybe for Wednesday—wait, no, actually, maybe Thursday would work better. Let’s find a good time.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: It’s a general check

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: What type of appointment do you need?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: For example.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is this a routine visit?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: A follow-up?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: something urgent?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: or a procedure.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: It’s more of a routine visit, just a general check-up. But I might need to follow up on something from last time, too.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I’m open to any available provider. Let’s see what times are open on Thursday.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a preferred provider or are you open to seeing any available provider?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Oh,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: It looks like you already have a routine visit and general check-up appointment booked.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: You know what,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: If you want, I can help you reschedule or cancel that appointment.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to do that?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: or do you need help with something else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually, let’s reschedule that appointment to Thursday instead—wait, no, hang on, maybe Friday would be better. Could we check Friday’s availability?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Oh, I see.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Since you already have this type of appointment booked, I can't check new times directly.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: That sounds good,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I can connect you to live support to help reschedule your appointment for Friday.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yes, please go ahead and transfer me. Thank you.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to transfer you now?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Oh, wait,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Something's not right.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: No problem,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: and having trouble booking your appointment.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Let me document this for our clinic support team so they can follow up with you.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, I'll hold.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please hold on a moment.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: connecting you to a representative.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please wait.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: All right, I’ll wait. Thanks.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Oh, okay. Thanks anyway. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Hello, you've reached the pretty good AI test line. Goodbye.
